bug.description: NGAP interface handling error between gNB and AMF causing procedure failure

prompt:
There is a NGAP interface handling error between gNB and AMF causing procedure failure downstream of function pdcp_advance_rx_window in the openair2/LAYER2/PDCP_v10.1.0 subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/PDCP_v10.1.0/pdcp_sequence_manager.c:121.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
